seo.title: Faizan Khan | MERN & AI Developer
seo.description: Portfolio of Faizan Khan, a full-stack MERN developer, Python and Django engineer, Flutter developer, and machine learning / NLP engineer building production-grade software.
seo.keywords: Faizan Khan, MERN developer, full stack developer, python developer, django engineer, flutter developer, machine learning engineer, NLP, AI developer, React, Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
seo.author: Faizan Khan

hero.name: Faizan Khan
hero.title: Full-Stack MERN Developer | Python & Django Engineer | Flutter Developer | Machine Learning & NLP Engineer | AI Developer
hero.tagline: Architecting scalable products, intelligent systems, and production-grade digital experiences.

about.paragraph: Faizan Khan builds production-minded software across frontend, backend, mobile, and AI. His work spans MERN applications, Django APIs, Flutter mobile experiences, and machine learning systems that emphasize reliability, clarity, and scale.

projects.title: Recipe Recommendation System
projects.summary: AI-powered recipe discovery platform built with Django and classical NLP techniques for personalized suggestions.
projects.shortDescription: Built an AI-assisted recipe recommendation system using Django, TF-IDF, and cosine similarity to personalize search results and recipe discovery. The workflow emphasizes relevance scoring, ingredient awareness, and a responsive UI for real-world usage.

projects.title: Blog Application
projects.summary: Editorial web platform with authentication, CRUD workflows, and a clean content-first interface.
projects.shortDescription: Developed a full CRUD blog platform with Django, responsive layouts, user comments, and a practical content management flow. The implementation centers on maintainability, clear navigation, and a professional publishing experience.

projects.title: Social Media Clone
projects.summary: Feature-rich community product with authentication, profiles, feeds, and engagement flows.
projects.shortDescription: Built a social platform concept with authentication, profiles, posts, likes, comments, and follow mechanics. The design is optimized for mobile-first interaction and demonstrates backend discipline alongside frontend clarity.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.summary: Motion-driven React portfolio with premium visual hierarchy and responsive presentation.
projects.shortDescription: Built a premium React and TypeScript portfolio system with motion, modular sections, and a recruiter-focused narrative. The result emphasizes polish, dark visual identity, and performance-aware composition.

testimonials.name: Project Stakeholder
testimonials.content: The solution was delivered with strong product thinking, clean UI structure, and a level of polish that feels production-ready.

testimonials.name: Technical Reviewer
testimonials.content: The engineering approach was structured, disciplined, and easy to extend across UI and backend layers.

testimonials.name: Hiring Manager
testimonials.content: Clear technical depth, strong presentation quality, and a portfolio that communicates senior-level intent.

timeline.title: Bachelor of Computer Science
timeline.description: Academic foundation focused on software engineering, AI, web development, and practical problem solving.

timeline.title: Full-Stack Development Certification
timeline.description: Completed structured training across Python, Django, React, and REST API workflows.

timeline.title: Applied AI Practice
timeline.description: Explored modern AI patterns, model integration, and practical workflows for intelligent software delivery.

timeline.title: Productivity and Tooling Certification
timeline.description: Built professional workflow discipline across documentation, collaboration, and delivery tooling.
